reviews.review_description: This game sucks it is literally unplayable when I try to play it nothing happens there’s no robot that comes up to request a order of pizza I tried restarting my headset and it still doesn’t work 0/10 do not recommend

developer_response.body:
Thank you for reporting this bug and really sorry for the bad experience you ran into. We have fixed this issue in the latest patch! Please update the game to version 0.1.5 and you should be good to go. 
If you run into something else or have ideas to make the game better, feel free to reach out to us anytime at tretastudios@gmail.com

Glad to hear that you enjoy playing the game!
If you have any suggestions or have ideas to make the game better, feel free to reach out to us anytime at tretastudios@gmail.com!

reviews.review_description: I LUV this game THANKS SO MUCH DEVELOPERS I just downloaded it and glad I did THANKS GOD BLESS

developer_response.body: Thank you! We are glad that you enjoy playing the game!

Glad to hear you have been enjoying the game! 
If you have any suggestions or have ideas to make the game better, feel free to reach out to us anytime at tretastudios@gmail.com!

reviews.review_description: I can not explain because it is so good

It’s easy to play, looks great, and feels just like running a real pizza place. slightly sci-fi aesthetic that makes the kitchen feel futuristic and fun. The visuals are amazing, and the whole experience is super immersive. Great fun for anyone who enjoys cooking or VR games.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We are glad that you enjoyed the game!

reviews.review_description: Nice game but it is very boring and slow...takes forever to make money...this game could better

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We’re really sorry to hear that you had a bad experience with our game. We're continuously working to make the game better and will take your suggestions into account. If you have any more feedback or need assistance, feel free to reach out to us at support@idzdigital.com. Stay tuned for new content in future updates.

reviews.review_description: Great game, one of my favorite pizza games but the money and the items are not set right. I have many people asking for items that I don't have amd I never can stock enough items. And I can never make enough money to buy new sodas. I have to click next all the time.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We're thrilled to hear that you love the game. Your feedback motivates us to continue improving. We're always working on new content and updates, and your feedback is noted. If you have any more suggestions or need assistance, feel free to reach out to us at support@idzdigital.com. Happy playing!

reviews.review_description: It didn’t explain how to play well enough and it made me nauseous just do not get it

developer_response.body: We’re really sorry to hear that you had a bad experience with our game. We strive to provide the best user experience and would love to understand what went wrong. Please feel free to reach out to us at support@idzdigital.com with more details, and we'll do our best to resolve the issue. Thank you for your feedback!

reviews.review_description: You need to make it where you get orders based on what you have so you don't have to keep pressing the next button and the game needs locomotion settings, the movement is pretty bad with controllers. Other than that the game is great and worth the money!
